articles.author: Scott  Pelley, Maria  Gavrilovic
articles.title: Former Sen. Ben Sasse, dying of cancer, reflects on family, faith and the future of America - CBS News
articles.description: Former Sen. Ben Sasse, dying of cancer, is using the time he has as "an opportunity to talk about bigger stuff." He reflects on America's future, and the importance of faith, community and family.
articles.content: Ben Sasse would like a final word. At the age of 54, the former U.S. senator of Nebraska is dying of pancreatic cancer. But a new drug is giving him extra time — time to hear his appeal for reason in… [+10375 chars]
